Size guide

Discover the perfect fit with our comprehensive Size Guide. This section offers precise sizing guidance for each jewelry category — including rings, bracelets, and necklaces. Learn how to accurately measure and ensure your Carrera y Carrera creation fits flawlessly, enhancing both comfort and elegance. Follow our refined instructions and expert tips designed to help your jewelry look and feel exceptional.

Rings
How to determine your ring size

To accurately find your ring size, we recommend measuring your finger at the end of the day, when it is neither too warm nor too cold. Remember, measurements can vary slightly between hands, so if you plan to wear your Carrera y Carrera ring on your right hand, measure that hand specifically.

Download table Measuring your finger
  • Use a string, ribbon, strip of paper, or measuring tape.
  • Wrap it around the base of your finger and mark where the ends meet.
  • Lay the string or paper flat and measure its length in millimeters (mm).
  • Use the chart above to find your ring size.
Using an Existing Ring
  • Select a ring that properly fits the finger.
  • Measure the interior diameter in millimeters (mm).
  • Use the chart above and find the size that match in millimeters (mm).
Tips
  • Measure your finger at the end of the day.
  • Do not measure your finger when it is hot or cold.
  • Remember that the two hands differ slightly in size.
  • Make sure that the chosen size leaves enough room for the ring to pass easily along the entire length of the finger.
Bracelets
determine your bracelet size using the paper sizer
  • Download the printable size guide below and print it.
  • Carefully cut out the paper ruler.
  • Wrap the paper ruler around your wrist, making sure to measure the widest part for the most accurate result, typically near the wrist bone.
  • The number pointed to by the arrows indicates your wrist measurement in cm.
  • If you prefer a looser fit, CyC recommend to add 1 cm to your measurement.
  • Once you have your size, go back to Bracelet Size Recommendation Table. Keep in mind that bracelet sizes may slightly vary depending on the specific collection or model.
Printable size guide Bracelets size guide
Necklaces
How to determine your necklace size

Print in actual size to see the real dimension of the motif. The dimensions are given as an indication. Each Carrera y Carrera creation is handmade, the size may vary from one creation to another.

Necklaces and pendants size guide

Each chain length in our Carrera y Carrera jewelry pieces comes with an additional adjustment option. The standard length can be shortened by 5 cm, allowing for two size options within the specified length.
